claims.evidence_text: The wheat germplasm P3228 has a tall PH (mean 96.95 cm), long SL (mean 10.58 cm), and low SCN (mean 2.20)
claims.claim_summary: Wheat germplasm PuBing3228 mean plant height 96.95 cm (tall parent).

claims.evidence_text: G8901 is a commercial cultivar with a short PH (mean 83.66 cm), short SL (mean 8.22 cm), and high SCN (mean 2.68)
claims.claim_summary: Wheat cultivar Gao8901 mean plant height 83.66 cm (short parent).

claims.evidence_text: Each plot consisted of a 1.5 m row with 0.25 m spacing between rows; 30 seeds were used, and 20 plants per row were retained after the emergence of seedlings
claims.claim_summary: Wheat field plots planted at 0.25 m (25 cm) row spacing.
